LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL WIELAND'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION CONTINUED FROM OCT-03-2006 TO LAW AND MOTION AT OCT-05-2006, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS LIKELY TO PREVAIL GIVEN THAT DEFENDANT'S OWNERSHIP INTEREST HAS CEASED, EXCEPT FOR A RIGHT TO BE PAID BASED ON THE APPRAISED VALUE AND HARM TO PLAINTIFF OF NOT MAINTAINING THE STATUS QUO WOULD GREATLY OUTWEIGH ANY HARM TO DEFENDANT. THE REQUEST TO REDUCE BOND AMOUNT IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Set For Trial On Jun-25-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-06-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause re: Preliminary Injunction. Preliminary Injunction is granted. Plaintiff is likely to prevail given that defendant's ownership interest has ceased, except for a right to be paid based on the appraised value and harm to plaintiff of not maintaining the status quo would greatly outweigh any harm to defendant. The request to reduce bond amount is denied. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Continued To Oct-05-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Lloyd K. Chapman, 818-416-5994, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. There being no compliance with the tentative ruling rule, the Court did not grant plaintiff's request to change the hearing date stated in the tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause re: Preliminary Injunction is continued to October 5, 2006 on the Court's own motion. Parties may appear ex parte to request a different Court date. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
